originalAlarm.description: 1st function call argument is an uninitialized value

sanitizedDescription: 1st function call argument is an uninitialized value
model:
(define-fun BB_AR () Bool
  true)
(define-fun BB_CP_MV () Bool
  true)
reasoning: src is assigned at L15 (src = rand() % 100) unconditionally before copySubFile(src, dst) at L18. The 1st argument is always initialized. The alarm is a false positive, likely arising because the desugared version merges the BB_AR and BB_CP_MV conditionals into runtime branches, causing CSA to mistrack src initialization on some paths. PC = BB_CP_MV AND BB_AR, no library macros.
